party.style: Banquet — main dishes presented together and shared.

mains.name: Chicken Tikka Masala
mains.description: Charcoal grilled chicken tikka cooked with tomato, onions, cashew nuts and fresh cream.

mains.name: Chicken Korma
mains.description: Mildly spiced breast of chicken with tomato, onion, almond and coconut with fresh cream to finish.

mains.name: Lamb Karahi
mains.description: Delicately cooked in caramelised onions, tomatoes, fresh green chilli, bell pepper, garlic and ginger.

mains.name: Tadka Dal
mains.description: Spiced yellow lentils tempered with onion, garlic and fresh coriander.

courses.sides: Served with rice and a selection of naan breads.

afternoonTea.note: Vegetarian options available — please speak to a member of staff.
afternoonTea.drinks: Bottomless traditional Indian tea, or English breakfast tea/coffee.
